content.problemStatement:
You are given a sequence of integers A1,A2,вА¶,ANA_1, A_2, \dots, A_NA1вАЛ,A2вАЛ,вА¶,ANвАЛ.

You should choose an arbitrary (possibly empty) subsequence of AAA and multiply each element of this subsequence by вИТ1-1вИТ1. The resulting sequence should satisfy the following condition: the sum of elements of any **contiguous** subsequence with length greater than 1 is strictly positive.

You should minimise the sum of elements of the resulting sequence. Find one such sequence with the minimum possible sum.
constraints: the sum of NNN for all test cases does not exceed 5вЛЕ1055 \cdot 10^55вЛЕ105
content.inputFormat:
The first line of the input contains a single integer TTT denoting the number of test cases. The description of TTT test cases follows.
The first line of each test case contains a single integer NNN.
The second line contains NNN space-separated integers A1,A2,вА¶,ANA_1, A_2, \dots, A_NA1вАЛ,A2вАЛ,вА¶,ANвАЛ.
content.outputFormat:
For each test case, print a single line containing NNN space-separated integers B1,B2,вА¶,BNB_1, B_2, \dots, B_NB1вАЛ,B2вАЛ,вА¶,BNвАЛ. For each valid iii, BiB_iBiвАЛ must be equal to either AiA_iAiвАЛ (the sign of this element did not change) or вИТAi-A_iвИТAiвАЛ (the sign of this element changed).

If there is more than one answer, you may output any one.

sampleTestCases.explanation:
Explanation:
Example case 1: If we change only the sign of A3A_3A3вАЛ, we get a sequence {4,3,вИТ1,2}\{4, 3, -1, 2\}{4,3,вИТ1,2} with sum 888. This sequence is valid because the sums of all its contiguous subsequences with length >1> 1>1 are positive. (For example, the sum of elements of the contiguous subsequence {A3,A4}\{A_3, A_4\}{A3вАЛ,A4вАЛ} equals вИТ1+2=1>0-1 + 2 = 1 > 0вИТ1+2=1>0.)
There are only two valid sequences {4,3,вИТ1,2}\{4, 3, -1, 2\}{4,3,вИТ1,2} and {4,3,1,2}\{4, 3, 1, 2\}{4,3,1,2} with sums 888 and 101010 respectively, so this sequence has the smallest possible sum.
For instance, the sequence {4,вИТ3,1,2}\{4, -3, 1, 2\}{4,вИТ3,1,2} isn't valid, because the sum of {A2,A3,A4}\{A_2, A_3, A_4\}{A2вАЛ,A3вАЛ,A4вАЛ} equals вИТ3+1+2=0вЙ§0-3 + 1 + 2 = 0 \le 0вИТ3+1+2=0вЙ§0.
